---
title: "Schedule"
sidebar: false
toc: false
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Workshop Schedule

## 3-hours 

| Time | Topic | Instructor |
|:-----------------:|:------------------------------------:|:-------------:|
| 12:00 - 12:45 | [Workshop Introduction](../slides/Intro2R4researchers_workshop.pdf) | Sichao |
| 12:45 - 2:45 | [Hands-on R and RStudio](../lessons/Intro-to-R.qmd) | Sichao |
| 2:45 - 3:00 | Questions and Wrap-up | Sichao |


## Resources

-   [Materials]()

## Cheatsheets

-   [base R cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/base-r.pdf)
-   [RStudio cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/rstudio-ide.pdf)
-   [ggplot2 cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/data-visualization-2.1.pdf)
